task_completion.description: Configure Proxy Base URL and Number of Decimals in Global Settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GeoServer 'Global Settings' page in a web browser. The 'Proxy Base URL' field must contain 'https://maps.cityplanning.example.com/geoserver' and the 'Number of Decimals' field must be set to '6'.

task_completion.description: Configure Verbose Reporting, Charset, and Logging Profile in Global Settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the GeoServer 'Global Settings' page, the 'Verbose Exception Reporting' checkbox must be checked, the 'Character Set' dropdown must be set to 'UTF-8', and the 'Logging Profile' dropdown must be set to 'PRODUCTION_LOGGING'.

task_completion.description: Configure Organization and Contact Person in Contact Information
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GeoServer 'Contact Information' page in a web browser. The 'Organization' field must contain 'City Planning Department' and the 'Contact' field must contain 'GIS Administrator'.

task_completion.description: Verify the configuration via WMS GetCapabilities document
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a browser tab or terminal output displaying an XML document (WMS GetCapabilities response). The URLs inside the XML tags (such as <OnlineResource>) must reflect the new proxy base URL: 'https://maps.cityplanning.example.com/geoserver'.

task_completion.description: Create the verification report with the required contents
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output showing the contents of '/home/ga/global_settings_report.txt'. It must contain exactly these values on separate lines: 'https://maps.cityplanning.example.com/geoserver', '6', 'PRODUCTION_LOGGING', and 'VERIFIED'.

integrity.description: Agent used the GeoServer web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the GeoServer Web Administration Interface in a web browser, rather than just using curl/REST API commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: WMS GetCapabilities check is a genuine server response
integrity.visual_evidence: The WMS GetCapabilities XML should be viewed in a browser (with the GeoServer URL in the address bar) or via a terminal command (like curl or wget) querying the server, not manually typed into a text editor.

integrity.description: Report file was actually saved to the filesystem
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use a text editor (nano, vim, gedit) or shell redirection (echo ... > file) to create the report at the specified path, rather than just printing the text to the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring GeoServer 2.25.2. Expected values: Proxy Base URL = 'https://maps.cityplanning.example.com/geoserver', Decimals = 6, Verbose Exception Reporting = true (checked), Character Set = 'UTF-8', Logging Profile = 'PRODUCTION_LOGGING', Organization = 'City Planning Department', Contact Person = 'GIS Administrator'. The final report must be saved at '/home/ga/global_settings_report.txt' and contain the proxy URL, '6', 'PRODUCTION_LOGGING', and 'VERIFIED' on separate lines.
